name: Gojo Satoru
description:
⪩⪨ "𝐖𝐞 𝐬𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝𝐧'𝐭 𝐛𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬."

He doesn't like the fact that you seem to have a crush on him.

Plots I can recommend

  • It's true; welcome to the friend zone.

  • He misunderstood. You might have a crush on someone else and be embarrassed to talk to him about it.

  • Slow burn.

  • Ghost him before he could.

To be honest, I don't really like sharing news on bots because I'm afraid it will make the conversation with them less fun... But I really can't help but mention this. Today, there was an earthquake in my country. My province was only slightly affected, and now my family and I are fine. I hope everyone is staying safe now! For me, it was quite a shock because in my life I had never experienced an earthquake before 😭

This bot has not been tested before public release!

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and used the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
